prompt:
gunk-dev/the-valley has just been made PUBLIC, so PR #612's private-repo token plumbing is now unnecessary and is the only thing making CI fail (the cosmo-automation app was never installed on gunk-dev, so the 'Generate the-valley read token' steps fail at mint). Revert exactly that plumbing from this PR's branch (agent/20260711-1621-a15cae31); change nothing else about the PR.

THE REVERTS:
1. .github/workflows/ci.yml: remove the two 'Generate the-valley read token' steps (build-nixos and check jobs) and restore the step-level NIX_CONFIG env lines to their pre-PR value: NIX_CONFIG: "access-tokens = github.com=${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}". Keep the PR's incidental whitespace cleanups if reverting them would be more churn.
2. .github/workflows/update-flake-lock.yml: remove the 'Generate the-valley read token' step and the NIX_CONFIG env it added to the Update flake.lock step (restore that step to its pre-PR form).
3. hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix: in the cosmo-rebuild script, remove the 'export NIX_CONFIG=...' line and its private-repo comment — the input is public; nixos-rebuild needs no token for it. Restore the script to the plain nixos-rebuild invocation.
4. Sweep the PR's other additions for now-stale private-repo mentions: docs/valley-git-hosting.md and any README addition — if they document the private-repo/app-token requirement, update to state the input is a public repo (keep it to a one-line touch).

Verify against the actual pre-PR file contents (git show origin/main:.github/workflows/ci.yml etc.) so the reverted hunks match main exactly — the goal is that the remaining PR diff contains zero workflow changes unless a whitespace cleanup remains, and zero token plumbing.

TESTS before pushing: nix flake check; nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath (should now work with no special access-tokens config since the input is public — if your sandbox has no network for flake input fetch, note that instead of faking it); zizmor if the workflows still differ from main. Push to the PR branch and leave a PR comment: the-valley is now public, token plumbing reverted, checklist items about the cosmo-automation app install no longer apply.
